title: Ade A. Olufeko
body:
Ade Abayomi Olufeko (born 1980) is a Nigerian-American technologist, artist, and entrepreneur. He is the founder of Visual Collaborative, an international platform for interdisciplinary projects in culture, innovation, and the humanities.
In 2017, he contributed to efforts related to the rediscovery and documentation of Sungbo's Eredo. A martial arts practitioner, he founded the Wing Chun Foundation Lagos in 2024, applying its principles to leadership development.
